'''âz-sh-f''' ('''kazashaf''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quantise|quantise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-sh-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quantise|quantise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âz-sh-f
|-
! Lemma
| kazashaf
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thizashaf|thizashaf]] || [[word:jizashaf|jizashaf]] || [[word:shizashaf|shizashaf]] || [[word:kizashaf|kizashaf]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuzashaf|thuthuzashaf]] || [[word:jujuzashaf|jujuzashaf]] || [[word:shushuzashaf|shushuzashaf]] || [[word:kukuzashaf|kukuzashaf]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuzashaf|thuzashaf]] || [[word:juzashaf|juzashaf]] || [[word:shuzashaf|shuzashaf]] || [[word:kuzashaf|kuzashaf]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuzashaf|thuzashaf]] || [[word:juzashaf|juzashaf]] || [[word:shuzashaf|shuzashaf]] || [[word:kuzashaf|kuzashaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thezashaf|thezashaf]] || [[word:jezashaf|jezashaf]] || [[word:shezashaf|shezashaf]] || [[word:kezashaf|kezashaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothozashaf|thothozashaf]] || [[word:jojozashaf|jojozashaf]] || [[word:shoshozashaf|shoshozashaf]] || [[word:kokozashaf|kokozashaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thozashaf|thozashaf]] || [[word:jozashaf|jozashaf]] || [[word:shozashaf|shozashaf]] || [[word:kozashaf|kozashaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thozashaf|thozashaf]] || [[word:jozashaf|jozashaf]] || [[word:shozashaf|shozashaf]] || [[word:kozashaf|kozashaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠzashaf|thĂŠzashaf]] || [[word:jĂŠzashaf|jĂŠzashaf]] || [[word:shĂŠzashaf|shĂŠzashaf]] || [[word:kĂŠzashaf|kĂŠzashaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathazashaf|thathazashaf]] || [[word:jajazashaf|jajazashaf]] || [[word:shashazashaf|shashazashaf]] || [[word:kakazashaf|kakazashaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thazashaf|thazashaf]] || [[word:jazashaf|jazashaf]] || [[word:shazashaf|shazashaf]] || [[word:kazashaf|kazashaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thazashaf|thazashaf]] || [[word:jazashaf|jazashaf]] || [[word:shazashaf|shazashaf]] || [[word:kazashaf|kazashaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shazashaf|shazashaf]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshazashaf|goshazashaf]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishazashaf|gokishazashaf]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shazashafnĂŒ|shazashafnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshazashafnknĂŒ|goshazashafnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishazashafnĂŒ|gokishazashafnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shazashafshĂ«|shazashafshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshazashafnkshĂ«|goshazashafnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishazashafshĂ«|gokishazashafshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazashafro|shazashafro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazashafnkro|goshazashafnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazashafro|gokishazashafro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shazashafmu|shazashafmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazashafnkmu|goshazashafnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazashafmu|gokishazashafmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shazashafsher|shazashafsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshazashafnksher|goshazashafnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishazashafsher|gokishazashafsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shazashafng|shazashafng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshazashafnkng|goshazashafnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishazashafng|gokishazashafng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shazashafya|shazashafya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshazashafnkya|goshazashafnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishazashafya|gokishazashafya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shazashafyam|shazashafyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshazashafnkyam|goshazashafnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishazashafyam|gokishazashafyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazashafnĂŒshĂ«|shazashafnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazashafnknĂŒshĂ«|goshazashafnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazashafnĂŒshĂ«|gokishazashafnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazashafnĂŒro|shazashafnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazashafnknĂŒro|goshazashafnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazashafnĂŒro|gokishazashafnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazashafnĂŒmu|shazashafnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazashafnknĂŒmu|goshazashafnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazashafnĂŒmu|gokishazashafnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazashafshĂ«nĂŒ|shazashafshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazashafnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshazashafnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazashafshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishazashafshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazashafshĂ«ro|shazashafshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazashafnkshĂ«ro|goshazashafnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazashafshĂ«ro|gokishazashafshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazashafshĂ«mu|shazashafshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazashafnkshĂ«mu|goshazashafnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazashafshĂ«mu|gokishazashafshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazashafronĂŒ|shazashafronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazashafnkronĂŒ|goshazashafnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazashafronĂŒ|gokishazashafronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazashafroshĂ«|shazashafroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazashafnkroshĂ«|goshazashafnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazashafroshĂ«|gokishazashafroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazashafromu|shazashafromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazashafnkromu|goshazashafnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazashafromu|gokishazashafromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazashafmunĂŒ|shazashafmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazashafnkmunĂŒ|goshazashafnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazashafmunĂŒ|gokishazashafmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazashafmushĂ«|shazashafmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazashafnkmushĂ«|goshazashafnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazashafmushĂ«|gokishazashafmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazashafmuro|shazashafmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazashafnkmuro|goshazashafnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazashafmuro|gokishazashafmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
